candidates.name: OAuth Token Expiration Sentinel
candidates.pitch: Monitors storage for OAuth tokens and shows countdown timers. Extension popup displays all detected tokens with expiration warnings. Quick build, immediate utility for devs dealing with OAuth flows.
candidates.pain: OAuth tokens expire silently in dev environments, causing cryptic auth failures during demos.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: GCP Invoice Line Item Categorizer
candidates.pitch: Parses GCP billing exports and lets users tag services by team or product. Generates attribution reports. CSV parsing and localStorage for tags makes this fully offline-capable initially.
candidates.pain: GCP invoices show service names without context, making it impossible to attribute costs to products.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: Sales Prospect Company News Timeline
candidates.pitch: Scrapes prospect company pages for news, funding, or hires and surfaces timeline in CRM context. Uses NewsAPI or custom scrapers. Direct CRM integration makes this sticky.
candidates.pain: Sales reps miss timing on prospect company news, losing the window for relevant outreach.

candidates.name: Gong Call Objection Response Library
candidates.pitch: Manually tagged library of objection categories linked to Gong clips. Searchable by objection type. Simple CRUD with video embedding. Low lift, high utility for sales teams.
candidates.pain: Reps improvise responses to objections instead of learning from proven responses across the team.

candidates.name: Meeting Transcript Auto-Chapter Generator
candidates.pitch: Uses speech-to-text and topic modeling to auto-generate chapters with timestamps. Saves clips with chapter markers. Gong integration or local processing.
candidates.pain: Meeting recordings are unwatchable, and extracting relevant sections requires manual scrubbing.

candidates.name: GitHub Issue Triage Speed Tracker
candidates.pitch: Queries GitHub API to track time-to-first-response by label, area, or maintainer. Generates weekly reports. Requires GitHub token auth. Clear value prop for OSS teams.
candidates.pain: Open source maintainers have no visibility into how fast issues get triaged, leading to contributor frustration.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: S3 Bucket Policy Complexity Analyzer
candidates.pitch: Parses IAM/JSON policies and visualizes complexity with scoring. Highlights contradictory statements. Direct S3 API integration for AWS users.
candidates.pain: S3 bucket policies become tangled over time, creating security blind spots that audits miss.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: Browser Console Error Pattern Clusterer
candidates.pitch: Clusters console errors by stack trace similarity and surfaces unique errors first. Built-in pattern matching. Saves devs hours during incident debugging.
candidates.pain: Console errors flood during debugging, hiding the root cause among similar noise.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link
